question_text: Which of the following best describes how a Sankey diagram helps explain the law of conservation of energy in a real appliance?

options.label: A
options.text: It shows how much energy the appliance costs per month

options.label: B
options.text: It shows all energy pathways, proving that total input energy equals total output energy (useful plus wasted), demonstrating that no energy is lost

options.label: C
options.text: It shows which energy transformations are the most important for the appliance to work

options.label: D
options.text: It calculates the efficiency percentage of the appliance

explanation: A Sankey diagram visually represents all energy flows and transformations in a system. By showing input and output (both useful and wasted) with proportional arrows, it demonstrates that energy is conserved—nothing disappears, it just transforms into less useful forms.
